MEMO TO SET AND NOTICE OF COURT TRIAL FILED BY PLAINTIFF CHONG, EDMOND COURT TRIAL SET FOR MAY-17-1994 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 05 NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL FILED
JUDGE WICK, BRENDA FIELDS, REPORTER C/C FOR COURT TRIAL, ALL PRESENT, DEFT IN PRO PER, CASE SETTLED. JUDGMENT FOR PLTF AND AGAINST DEFT, TERMS READ INTO RECORD. PLTF PREPARED JUDGMENT.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CONNOLLY, SCOTT THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 556 LARKIN ST, #403, S.F, CA $647.00 RENT, TOTAL JUDGMENT $647.00, STAYED UNTIL MAY-31-1994, LEASE FORFEITED, PLAINTIFF WAIVES COSTS OF SUIT
